hotel_name: Vinpearl Resort & Spa Hạ Long (Vinpearl Resort & Spa Ha Long)

reviews.title: Save Money on Your Room and Spend More on Services
reviews.text: The 3 meal combo is worth getting. The buffet has plenty of options and the food quality is decent. But after a couple of days, you start seeing the same dishes, so I wouldn't stretch the stay beyond 3 days. The real value here is not in the room upgrade. I booked the Executive Suite thinking it would be a step above, but the experience didn't match what I got at other resorts. A standard room would have done just fine. Take that price difference and put it toward the paid activities and services on the island .

reviews.title: A Relaxing Luxury Getaway with Stunning Ha Long Bay Views
reviews.text:
Vinpearl Resort is a very well maintained resort with friendly staff and excellent facilities. The water sports activities were great, the pool is absolutely humongous, and having pickleball courts was a fantastic bonus. The spa was also fabulous and perfect for relaxing after a day of activities.

We spent two days there with full board, and the food selection was extensive with plenty of variety across all meals.

The resort is reached by boat, with transfers running every 30 minutes around the clock, which made everything very convenient. It is a wonderful getaway with beautiful views of the limestone formations across Ha Long Bay. If you are looking for a bit more atmosphere outside the resort, there are also plenty of beach bars along the mainland coast nearby.

reviews.title: Not for everybody
reviews.text:
I have mixed feelings about this resort. One one hand, it is beautifully appointed and the facilities are generally excellent, as is the food. However, while the location may seem idyllic there are some detriments 
1. It is somewhat in the middle of nowhere in relation to the rest of the city
2. There are fixed times to go back and forth from the island to the mainland so if you miss the boat you wait another half hour
3. The beach is a small area roped off, the water does not look clean at all. 

 Lastly, Being an English speaking Canadian was not easy. I was injured at the hotel because of some hidden step in the public bathroom (yes there is one) and it was hard to communicate with the staff over it.

From the crowd it really looks like an idyllic place for families with children

reviews.title: True luxury
reviews.positives:
Without a doubt, the best hotel I stayed in. This was my second time staying there and both times it’s been an absolutely outstanding experience from start to finish.

The entire property is stunning. The outdoor pools are simply breathtaking, and the overall design and aesthetics of the resort create a truly relaxing and luxurious atmosphere. Everything feels thoughtfully curated and beautifully maintained.

The rooms overlooking the sea are a highlight… waking up to that view every day was something special. The staff were equally impressive: professional, attentive, and consistently warm, making us feel genuinely welcome throughout our stay.

Dining was another standout. The views from the restaurants, especially the Pavilion Restaurant, were incredible and elevated the whole experience even further.

One of the most unique touches is the boat transfer to the resort, it really sets the tone for a premium, almost exclusive getaway from the moment you arrive.

To top it all off, we received a 30% discount on all meals through Booking.com Genius rewards, which made the experience even better value for money.

Overall, this was true 5-star treatment in every sense. I would highly recommend Vinpearl Resort and would happily return again.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Vinpearl, a restaurant with a sea view.
reviews.text: Vinpearl does not disappoint. It is the best hotel with a private island, kind service, and cleanliness. However, there was a small issue with the room assignment for the deluxe sea pool terrace view I booked; it was assigned to the first floor with a garden view. This might be due to a communication problem between the booking site Agoda and the hotel, but I was satisfied as they listened to my concerns. It is a good hotel.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text: Fantastic facilities unfortunately the loudness and rudeness of the other guests spoils the niceness of the resort.  We were in a suite and unfortunately there is a clear issue with damp and mould  in these rooms- the smell is strong as you come into the rooms- which housekeeping cover with room fresher. The corridors have dehumidifiers to try to control the issue but clearly this is huge problem. The worst part is the hotel had some so called VIP guests when we arrived at the hotel and so we were pushed out of the entrance area and made to wait in a side room for a hour before we could get a boat to the main resort - the hotel’s priority clearly were their VIP guests and the eventually they had going on that day!!!!!

On the slide down side, this hotel hosts weddings so the restaurants/staff were fully reserved on two days and we had to go to mainland for dinner (that was convenient because we were jet lagged). And requiring ferry to and from the hotel wears out after the first day. Hotel ferry runs every half hour only so need to take that into account to plan shore excursions and airport transfer — that is a bit of a hassle, but not a big  deal.

reviews.title: Aussie opinion must read!!!
reviews.negatives:
I recently stayed here for my honeymoon, and while the views were absolutely amazing, the overall experience was extremely disappointing. The customer service was consistently poor, and I had to triple-check every bill because staff repeatedly forgot to apply the 30% discount that was included in my booking. I was also charged 1,445,000 VND around $85 AUD for laundry (6 pairs of briefs, 6 t-shirts, and 2 pairs of men’s shorts), which was never explained properly we got told it was per 5 items not per item and far above reasonable pricing also had a voucher there which was never added to the final bill.

Our booking also included vouchers that we never received, adding to the feeling of disorganisation the WhatsApp lady confusing us even more making bookings through her and then turning up to the venue with no booking made.

Because the resort had so few guests, they would pick and choose which restaurants were open, and the buffet was never as advertised, with limited selections and reduced quality. It genuinely felt like facilities were being cut back without telling anyone prices and the place of the buffet changed each night.

Another frustrating detail was seeing staff using the pools while guests were trying to relax, which felt very unprofessional. Room service showed up at 9am and were extremely noisy, making it hard to enjoy a slow morning especially if you have just travelled a massive distance the day before. Our room door stopped working randomly while they did fix it, it just added to the ongoing frustrations.

It honestly got to the point where, after going to the mainland, we didn’t even want to get back on the boat to return to the island which was sad as the place is absolutely stunning to look at. This left a really disappointing mark on what was supposed to be our honeymoon, especially compared to the other places we stayed which were much cheaper, far better service, and much better value.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel is very beautiful and the rooms are excellent; they are also always very clean. The view is very beautiful. Also, the transportation to the island was always very punctual. The indoor pool is very good, as well as the sauna and the jacuzzi, although we found it strange that they were separated for men and women.
reviews.negatives: A major reason we chose this hotel was a highly recommended steakhouse called Pavilion, which was closed throughout our entire stay due to an Indian wedding held on the property. This closure, combined with the fact that half of the other restaurants were closed, resulted in very few dining choices. This also made the breakfast chaotic: there were always queues for everything and hardly any tables available to sit and eat. Separately, we found it disappointing that they charge a fee to use the tennis and padel courts; it seems strange to have them if guests have to pay extra.

reviews.title: Exceptional stay in Halong Bay -a true luxury escape
reviews.text: Whether you’re looking for a romantic escape, a peaceful retreat or simply a luxurious base to explore one of the most beautiful destinations, this hotel delivers on every level. I would return in a heartbeat and highly recommend it yo anyone visiting Halong Bay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: My family liked the staff, they were nice and accommodating, my son likes the pizza and the morning buffet was good, the dinner buffet was pretty good. My wife and mother in law liked it and they are picky eaters. The view is nice depending on which view you get, The morning view of the ocean is nice but at night the city view is nice, so you have to pick which view you want to see. The pool is big and there is also an indoor pool which is nice when it rains outside.
reviews.negatives: My family didn't like the fact that when we got into our rooms, one room smelled moldy and the A/C didn't work to well, also the room was dirty and not clean, it seemed they rushed to clean the room. Then my second room next door smelled like nail polish and it was heavy, to the point we couldn't stay in the room to long cause it gave us a headache. We brought it up to the staff and they gave us 2 new different rooms which were a lot better, that's why for the staff I would give them 5 stars, but for the hotel itself, I would give them 3.5 stars.

reviews.title: Stunning hotel with amazing staff!!!!
reviews.text: What an absolutely gorgeous hotel from the check in area on land to the whole hotel on the island.  It is just something else!!!! The staff are extremely nice and professional! Service like you have never seen!!! Everywhere you look in this hotel is just top notch!!! Never seen anything like it. The lady who looks after you via WhatsApp is amazing!!!! She couldn't have done more for us thank you.  The breakfast selection was like nothing I have seen at a hotel! The pools are unbelievable, the indoor pool has to be my favorite of any pool I have ever used!! We dined in all the restaurants and the service was perfect!! The 30percent discount we got for pre booking really was appreciated.The only unpleasant thing we had was the noise in the room. Our room was on the north east of the island. When the evening came the music from the beach bar across the water was absolutely ridiculous. You couldn't just relax on the balcony due to the thumping. It's like being next door to a disco. So we went for dinner thinking that when we got back it would have stopped. Nope. Instead you could still hear it through the closed door. I rang reception to ask when does it stop and they said 11 to which it did stop.  If I was staying more than one night I would have asked to be moved.  We payed for sea view and we got sea view but it came with us feeling like we were living next to a nightclub. I can't help but feel they know this and put all the familys with kids on this side thinking kids are noisey so they can go that side. As we were a family and everyone else I seen that side had kids too.  It was just a shame as we were told at reception we had the the best view, sea and pool view.  It wasn't pool view, maybe a mix up in the language, it was an insane view just not worth the thumping all eve.  I would definitely stay again if the budget allowed it but would want a view overlooking the pool and that's what I would recommend for anyone who wishes to stay. But unfortunately for me the noise made this hotel loose a star from 5 to 4.

reviews.title: VINPEARL RESORT AND SPA IS AMONGST THE BEST RESORTS IN VIETNAM
reviews.positives: We had the amazing time of our holiday at Vinpearl, the location was fabulous and the property almost out of this world. The Pool was great and so were the private islands. Breakfast was wholesome and what a spread, it was. The head chef made sure he walked around and ensured everybody got what they wanted. The property was just amazing at night and the transport speedboat every half and hour, was just great so we could step out anytime. On the whole, we loved the property and the entire experience we had at the hotel.
reviews.negatives: We got everything that we wanted, we do not have any reasons to dislike the property or the services provided.

reviews.title: Most amazing Hotel

reviews.title: Not for people looking for a relaxing getaway
reviews.positives: The rooms were nice and the resort is beautiful
reviews.negatives: The families with screaming kids made it a terrible experience. Constantly running up and down the halls, shouting all night. From late at night to early in the morning, parents and kids were shouting in the halls, made it very difficult to sleep at all. No such thing as "quiet hours" here. The only time there wasn't running and yelling in the hallways and rooms was when the families were all down at the pool (still screaming there, of course). It felt more like living inside an amusement park than a hotel. Bottom line: if you're looking for a relaxing and restful vacation - go somewhere else.

reviews.title: Recommended accommodations in Ha Long Bay
reviews.text: I was really disappointed that I couldn't use the facilities because I checked out early after just one night. The breakfast was excellent, and the resort, accessed by a boat, had a unique charm. The night view, pool, and beach were all wonderful! At such a low price, my companions were very satisfied as well. Next time I visit Ha Long Bay, I will likely stay here again!

We truly enjoyed every moment of our stay and were very impressed with the service and hospitality. We will definitely return in the future, hopefully with our whole family.

Children under five should also have the opportunity to explore and enjoy the pool, but this becomes difficult when older kids occupy the space with large floats. Additionally, there is a risk of younger children being accidentally knocked into the water or held down, which could cause them to swallow a significant amount of water—a very dangerous situation.

It is far from a 5 star experience...
2 restaurants aren't that great we couldn't eat there we had to keep going to the mainland alsmot everyday. The Italian restaurant was so bad we didn't even eat some meals. The breakfast was alright though. 

We stayed 5 days. They don't allow even Ramyon noodles for kids to bring in (don't feed that to your kids but we had no choice as they couldn't eat anything else) that was sad we had to make a scene to allow us a snack.

 The water pressure in the showers was too weak can't take a good shower. The heating didn't work only AC was on but it was kinda cold during our stay. We were leaving with mostly uncomfortable feelings rather than sarisfied unfortunately. That was my last thought when leaving.

reviews.title: Great facilities but...
reviews.text:
Talk about grand entrances. Coming from Hanoi we did not know what to expect regarding how to get to the island. As it turns out they have a shuttle service between the mainland and the island that runs every 30 minutes pretty much round the clock out in demand. The hotel looks great and the facilities are new. Our room looked out to the ocean and I'm sure the view would have been great had it not been for the rain. The room was spacious and clean. Breakfast was great, with a wide selection to choose from.

Our only discomfort was when a shift manager/staff member (tall guy with glasses, kind of geeky looking) came over and sat down at the table next to us for his coffee break. We thought that was strange, but then he started taking VERY loud and exaggerated sips of his coffee at 10 seconds intervals until he finished his coffee. He then proceeded to lounge back in his chair for awhile before leaving.

My wife said he was actually standing around sipping his coffee before he came to sit down next to us. We tried to ignore him but it was hard not to notice his antics.

Overall, the facilities were 5 star. The staff were generally friendly and the service was good, however perhaps not 5 star as we had expected. Perhaps some staff need further training.

reviews.title: Fantastic stay!
reviews.positives:
I absolutely loved this hotel! It was everything a hotel should be and great value for money. My room had ocean view overlooking Halong Bay. It was fantastic although the weather was quite gloomy. Not sure if it was pollution or just cloudy. The room was quiet. I had the most comfortable bed with the best pillows I have ever had in a hotel (and I travel a lot).  I loved the HOT shower too and that the room also had a bathtub.
My phone did not charge so I was using an outlet downstairs. One of the staff noticed and sent a charger up to my room without me having to ask. A very nice gesture.
Everything was clearly marked. The indoor swimming pool was luxury and about 28m long! Both the women and men's dressing rooms near the swimming pool have their own private jacuzzi, sauna and steam room for free use! I also had a spa treatment which was also amazing!
The breakfast options were fabulous with a wide variety for all tastes and cultures.

I ate a hamburger at one of the restaurants. Although the beef was good, the bacon was hard and full of fat which I had to take out. Otherwise, overall good quality of food.

The staff were amazing and very helpful.
The speedboats run every 20 minutes (takes 3-5 min) 24 hours which is fantastic!
Would definitely come back in a heartbeat!

There is a massive cleanup for the plastic pollution in the water at Halong Bay. I was pleasantly surprised to have only  seen 3 pieces of trash floating next to the shore. This was something I was very worried about. I stayed at the hotel and went for a day trip cruise and that was perfect!
reviews.negatives:
A few thoughts to consider:

The water bottles are located in the bathroom- so almost missed them! Better to put them in the sleeping area next to the information sheets and menu.

Housekeeping should check the shampoo, conditioner and body wash bottles to make sure they are working properly. The conditioner was not coming out and I asked for it to be refilled. It was, but it still did not come out.. Upon further inspection, the tube inside was blocked so once cleaned out, it worked perfectly!

It is absolutely fine to ask guests to write a review. However, when one is asked to write a good review or rate the hotel as a 10, this leaves a very bad taste. This is an honest review, but something to be cautious of when guests are checking out.

reviews.title: Disappointing Stay Despite the Vinpearl Brand
reviews.text:
The resort is located away from the mainland, which means once you’re there, you are completely dependent on the property for food and basic needs. Unfortunately, outside food or drinks are not allowed, which becomes frustrating given the limited dining flexibility.
Restaurants close very early (9:30 PM). Even though we tried to place an order at 9:20 PM, it was flatly refused. For a luxury resort, this is extremely disappointing and leaves guests with no options late in the evening.
One very unpleasant experience was with housekeeping. At around 7:00 AM, cleaning staff banged loudly on our door, so aggressively that it felt like an earthquake. We were genuinely scared and shocked to be woken up this way. This shows a complete lack of training and respect for guest privacy.
The rooms are average and do not match the premium pricing. Overall, the property is not well maintained—it feels dated and poorly managed in several areas. The beach is not clean, which further reduces the charm of a seaside resort.
The only real positive was the indoor heated swimming pool, which was enjoyable and well maintained.
Overall, this resort does not live up to the Vinpearl brand promise. With better maintenance, staff training, flexible dining hours, and improved beach cleanliness, it could be much better—but in its current state, it is not worth the price.

reviews.title: Vinpearl Resort & Spa Ha Long is highly recommended for swimming and relaxation!
reviews.text:
We went with three people, including my mother and wife.

It seems like they provide most of the room views if you request, and I recommend the sea view.

We stayed in a suite and requested twin beds, but that doesn’t seem to be possible. An extra bed was added instead.

Additionally, you need to pay a deposit of 2 million VND. Please remember this. You can use the deposit for the minibar or drinks and beer during meals, so it's better to be aware of this rather than going without knowing.

Currency exchange is possible within the resort, but they don't exchange a lot. I exchanged money directly at the airport... I managed to exchange it comfortably, as I was with my mother! All meals were included, but you can also use other restaurants.

On the first day, we were tired and had the dinner buffet, and on the second day, we had breakfast and lunch at the same restaurant and dinner at another restaurant. Each restaurant offers a discount for changing.

I also had a massage, but even with a 200,000 VND discount, it was expensive since it's a resort.

Importantly, when checking in and taking the boat, there is a staff member who provides guidance through KakaoTalk for Korean guests, and I received all the assistance through that person, which was very nice.

All the staff were friendly, the accommodation was great, the view was nice, and the pool had clean water. If there was any issue, it wasn't the case for everyone, but there were some problems due to certain Chinese tourists; however, it wasn't a problem at all.

Everyone was really kind, and we had a great time relaxing.
Thank you!

reviews.title: Exceptional Stay Experience
reviews.text:
I had the pleasure of staying at Vinpearl Resort & Spa Ha Long during the AICFM18 International Conference, where I also served as a session chair and presenter. The experience was exceptional from start to finish.
Location & Ambience:
Nestled on its own private island in the heart of Ha Long Bay, the resort offers breathtaking panoramic views of the bay’s iconic limestone karsts. The serene atmosphere provided the perfect balance between professional engagement and relaxation.
Accommodation:
My room was spacious, elegantly furnished, and offered a stunning sea view. The bed was incredibly comfortable, and the room amenities were top-notch, including a well-stocked minibar, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a luxurious bathroom.
Conference Facilities:
As a session chair and speaker at AICFM18, I was impressed by the resort’s conference facilities. The meeting rooms were well-equipped with modern AV systems, and the staff provided seamless support throughout the event. The setting added a touch of prestige to the academic discussions.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
﻿El hotel es muy bonito y precioso, la arquitectura es impresionante, un hotel elevado encima de una pequeña isla con sus playas privadas y sus piscinas. Fabuloso. Y el equipo super amable la verdad, y muy paciente. ﻿ ﻿El wifi está bueno cuando está conectado y como lo tienes que conectar todos los dos por tres pues no ayuda a tener una buena conexión. .﻿El restaurante de fuera, sobre islotes, es súper interesante y fue una sorpresa para nosotros, se ve que al jefe de cocina le encanta su trabajo, gustos interesantes y precio razonable al precio del buffet. También si quieres picar algo en la piscina, la carta no está mal y los smoothies son muy buenos. ﻿ También si os gusta dormir con calor hay que preguntar porque todas las habitaciones no lo tienen. También hay que preguntar qué al momento que vais a venir vivir la experiencia de este hotel, no hay reformas, porque da igual que pagas o no, ya pueden hacer ruido tapando por la mañana. 
﻿por suerte cada vez que te pasa algo hacen todo para rectificar la situación, o darte algo de compensación. Y esta muy bien pero nosotros hemos tenido demasiadas cosas en poco tiempo y es una lastima. Tienen siempre la sonrisa y la educación esto no lo podemos negar. Así que gracias a ellos para probar de hacérnoslos pasar lo mejor posible. Volvería sin dudas pero cuando hayan arreglado estos detalles que te pueden molestar.
reviews.negatives: ﻿Pero les falta mucho para entender al cliente. No somos maquinas de dinero, hacen pagar las bolas y raquetas de tenis más el terreno es un poco vergonzoso por un 5 estrellas, nunca había visto esto y bueno no hablo de mi cita de la peluquería que casi me destruye el pelo. ﻿Por lo de los restaurantes, no hay nada de otro mundo y algo seguro que lo que enseñan en las fotos, no tiene nada que ver con lo que tendréis. El buffet principal es básico y caro por lo que es, no lo recomiendo porque es más caro que a la carta!! No hay restaurantes típico japonés como lo dicen en la descripción.﻿ También te pueden preguntar más dinero para tener la vista al océano, pero no hay que olvidar que es una isla, al final está el océano todo alrededor del hotel. ﻿ Hay un tour de barco en el hotel, pensábamos que fuera diferente pero no, es el mismo tour que los de internet o los que puedes encontrar en una tienda. O sea, eres solo dinero. Va todo rápido, en el barco las bebidas las tienes que pagar igual el agua durante la comida, y la comida pues es una vergüenza también. No les cuesta absolutamente nada pero tú pagas caro. También hay que saber que hay muchísima gente, no es agradable y llegamos al mismo momento que todos los otros tour al mismo lugar, para decir que para disfrutar de esta maravilla del mundo, es complicado. Si tenéis la oportunidad y el dinero mejor un tour privado con vuestro barco así podrías ir donde queréis y al momento que queréis.

reviews.title: Unusual option for a stay in Halong
reviews.text:
We stayed here for a night after a boat trip to Halong Bay.
The location, facilities, staff etc were great, but the hotel is starting to look a little tired in parts and prob not quite the five star it claims - but it's also very busy which is quite a shock after being on a boat with much smaller pax numbers - so much so that there were kids running up and down corridors until late at night etc. 
The hotel tries to minimise the impact (eg you can have breakfast in a smaller quieter restaurant rather than the main one) but it still felt like there were 20% more folks there than would have been ideal.

A good experience and one that could be better when quieter but not one I'd be keen to repeat for more than a night or two.

reviews.title: Magnifique hôtel sur la baie de Ha Long
reviews.positives: L'hôtel est majestueux. Il se trouve sur une petite île privée et il est nécessaire de prendre le bateau (2 minutes). Celui-ci passe deux fois par heure dans chaque sens. Il suffit de planifier ses trajets et cela ne pose pas de problème. L'hôtel est très beau et très propre et le personnel est très gentil. Reconnaissance faciale pour accéder au bateau et aux restaurants. Merci au personnel d'avoir répondu à toutes mes questions. Le prix des prestations dans les restaurants est correct. Nous avons testé les deux restaurants à la carte et c'était parfait.
reviews.negatives:
Les heures d'accès au buffet très strictes...Par exemple le midi c'est 12/14h mais n'arrivez pas à 13h45...
Pas énormément de choix de charcuterie au petit déjeuner.

reviews.title: Five families had a wonderful stay.
reviews.text: A family of five visited and used two rooms connected for three people and two people. During the day, we swam in the pool while enjoying cocktails, and in the evening, we experienced excellent dining at the Pavilion fine dining restaurant and a massage at Vinpearl. The breakfast had options that suited foreigners, which was very satisfying. Emily Hoang at the check-in counter for Vinpearl Resort provided comfort and enjoyment during our stay with her kind and quick responses. The luxury of enjoying the islands of Ha Long Bay was very satisfying. The Wi-Fi is fast.

I told the people to quiet down 5 mins later they started again.  My husband emailed the hotel and they said to ring them if the guests continue to be noisy. The next morning the hotel took us to a private room for breakfast, which was really good. I find though that hotel staff and more personable in smaller resorts etc. in a large resort you don’t really get that experience no way near as much. We went on a boat cruise in Halong bay which was amazing for my birthday.

reviews.title: Un hôtel idéalement situé face à la baie d’Halong, parfait pour les familles avec enfants. Confort optimal, vue splendid
reviews.positives:
Emplacement et cadre: 
L'hôtel est situé sur une petite ile face à la baie d'Halong, offrant un cadre exceptionnel et une vue spectaculaire.

Chambre et confort:
La suite exécutive est spacieuse, confortable, idéale pour une famille avec enfants, avec une grande salle de bain et une vue à couper le souffle.

Services & facilité:
Check-in rapide, navette bateau 24h/24 gratuite, ce qui rend le séjour simple et pratique.

Restauration:
Buffet du petit-déjeuner et du déjeuner très variés et délicieux.

Infrastructures:
Superbe piscine extérieure, piscine intérieure agréable, belle salle de sport, et une magnifique plage de sable blanc juste en face de la baie.

Kids club et personnel:
Kids club très beau et bien équipé. 
Le personnel de la réception parlant un anglais parfait, facilitant la communication. (Rare au Vietnam)
reviews.negatives:
Vraiment pas grand chose et rien de bien important mais :

Décoration et état des chambres :
Intérieur montrant quelques signes d'usure malgré un bon confort et beau look général.

Restauration:
Le diner est très mal organisé, avec un système de buffet partiellement servi à table, ce qui cause confusion et frustration. Les desserts en général ne sont vraiment pas bons !! 

Communication:
Les gentilles animatrices du kids club ne parlent ni anglais ni français, rendant la communication difficile pour les enfants européens. Pareil à la piscine.

reviews.title: La Maison Blanche d’Halong
reviews.positives: Le bâtiment est magnifique , la piscine principale gigantesque avec une musique de notre goût au pool bar. Nous avons adoré le restaurant le fruit de mer le premier soir , les employés de ce restaurant sont dignes d’un service haut de gamme. Le petit déjeuner est vraiment varié.
reviews.negatives: J’ai mis la note de 10 car ils méritent mais j’ai une remarque sur la politique commerciale. J’avais réservé avec booking une offre privilège pour une nuit et j’avais 30% sur la nourriture et les boissons. Finalement c’était que sur la nourriture. On voulait rester une deuxième nuit , on avait encore le même tarif privilège sur booking j’ai signalé que je comptais réserver. J’ai fait une erreur car le tarif avait disparu de booking. Du coup je n’avais plus l’offre ni les 30% sur les repas. On serait retourné au restaurant de l’hôtel  avec plaisir mais on a eu l’occasion d’en découvrir un autre très bien en ville.

reviews.positives: Pas retourné à la baie depuis 30 ans. Beaucoup de changement. Le site de Vinpearl est exceptionnel. Peut-être un peu onéreux pour certains, mais cela vaut la peine. Piscines extérieure et intérieure. Grande gentillesse du personnel et comme souvent au Viêtnam, ils ont le sens du service sourire aux lèvres. Rien ne manque. Les 3 restaurants sont tops. Italien, steakhouse, grill, et buffet. Navette gratis toutes les 20 min pour la baie très pratique. Le bâtiment est de très belle architecture. Mieux que Cat Ba trop touristique.

reviews.text: The island itself is impressive as it serves as a resort with a dock similar to a hotel lobby where you board the boat. The scenery of Ha Long Bay is excellent, and nothing is lacking, from the outdoor pool to the breakfast. I expressed disappointment because the pillow was not clean, but the proactive willingness of the manager and housekeeping to resolve the issue turned my disappointment into satisfaction. I have the intention to revisit with my parents next time.

Gần vinpearl hạ long có mấy out dour club và nhạc sàn rất to đến tận 11h30 đêm vẫn ầm ầm. Dù đóng kín cửa vẫn nghe thấy tiếng nhạc sàn. Nhà mình đã đặt phòng terrace hướng biển với hi vọng buổi tối sẽ ngồi thư giãn, nói chuyện trong tiếng sóng biển rì rào thì toàn bị tra tấn bởi nhạc sàn. Đây không phải lỗi của Vinpearl, nhưng ảnh hưởng rất nhiều tới trải nghiệm của khách.

reviews.title: A sudden appearance or debut.
reviews.text:
The dock leading to the resort was the most gorgeous, spacious, and luxurious. The room had a king-size bed with an extra bed, but it was small for the price, and the TV was also small. There was only one armchair with an ottoman and a chair in front of the dresser, making it uncomfortable to relax. There was a terrace, but there were too few chairs. I wished they had increased the number of chairs to match the number of guests. The complimentary water was in glass bottles, making it inconvenient for transport. Despite there being no shop or vending machines in the hotel, the minibar selection was poor.

Breakfast had a wide variety of items, but the taste was average. There were too few types of cheese and fruit. There were too few tables for the number of guests, making it crowded. Some items were out of stock. I stayed for two nights, and it was good that the juice changed daily.

Due to the rain, the outdoor pool was not usable, but the indoor pool was warm, and staff were always present, making it safe to play. They also had floating rings available for rent. It seemed okay to go to the pool in the room's gown. The dedicated lockers and shower rooms were clean and luxurious. Like the outdoor pool, it would have been nice if it were a bit larger.

The kids' room also had large playground equipment that was enjoyable. There was a clinic right next door, which provided peace of mind for playtime.
